title: schortia californica
intro: Schortia californica, also known as California buckwheat or California false buckwheat, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Medicinally, Schortia californica has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with some herbalists recommending it as a treatment for colds, flu, and respiratory issues.
